title: phyllanthus manono
intro: Phyllanthus manono, also known as the manono plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Pacific Island medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Phyllanthus manono include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
